subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and its contents brought spiritual joy and delight, for the journey to Iran [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و مضمون سبب روح و ریحان گردید که سفر ایران در
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
